description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, delta-shaped fuselage. The wings are integrated into the main body, extending outward with a slight forward sweep and ending in long, needle-like tips. Two prominent engine nacelles are mounted on either side of the fuselage, each with a circular intake highlighted by a faint blue glow. The tail section is minimalistic, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer, and instead features elongated, tapered extensions. The surface appears smooth and dark, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, giving the airplane a stealthy, high-tech appearance. No visible landing gear or cockpit windows are apparent, suggesting a highly integrated design.
description: A futuristic, delta-shaped airplane with swept wings, elongated engine nacelles, and a smooth, dark surface. The design is streamlined and minimalistic, with glowing blue engine intakes and needle-like wing tips.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide wing roots, and the two engine nacelles flanking the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin, elongated profile, swept wings, and the long, needle-like extensions at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the circular blue engine intakes and the symmetry of the wing and tail extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the streamlined body and the length of the rear extensions.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, forward-swept delta configuration with long, needle-like wingtip extensions and no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wing roots with circular intakes.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with twin elongated, tapered extensions and no visible vertical stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, fully enclosed cockpit with no visible canopy or windows.
